title: isotrema wuanum
intro: Isotrema wuanum is a plant species in the Apocynaceae family, commonly found in tropical forests of Southeast Asia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral activities. The health benefits of Isotrema wuanum include relief from fever, digestive issues, and respiratory problems, as well as its potential to aid in wound healing and skin infections. Traditionally, the plant is prepared for consumption by boiling or infusing its leaves in hot water, and it can also be used topically in the form of a paste or ointment.
